        :root {

          --font-code: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New', monospace;
        }

        :root {

          --typography-code-font-family: var(--font-code);
        }

:root {
  --bprogress-color: var(--accent);
  --bprogress-height: 3px;
  --bprogress-spinner-size: 18px;
  --bprogress-spinner-animation-duration: 400ms;
  --bprogress-spinner-border-size: 2px;
  --bprogress-box-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--accent), 0 0 5px var(--accent);
  --bprogress-z-index: 99999;
  --bprogress-spinner-top: 15px;
  --bprogress-spinner-bottom: auto;
  --bprogress-spinner-right: 15px;
  --bprogress-spinner-left: auto;
}

.bprogress {
  width: 0;
  height: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: var(--bprogress-z-index);
}

.bprogress .bar {
  background: var(--bprogress-color);
  position: fixed;
  z-index: var(--bprogress-z-index);
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: var(--bprogress-height);
}

/* Fancy blur effect */
.bprogress .peg {
  display: block;
  position: absolute;
  right: 0;
  width: 100px;
  height: 100%;
  box-shadow: var(--bprogress-box-shadow);
  opacity: 1.0;
  transform: rotate(3deg) translate(0px, -4px);
}

/* Remove these to get rid of the spinner */
.bprogress .spinner {
  display: block;
  position: fixed;
  z-index: var(--bprogress-z-index);
  top: var(--bprogress-spinner-top);
  bottom: var(--bprogress-spinner-bottom);
  right: var(--bprogress-spinner-right);
  left: var(--bprogress-spinner-left);
}

.bprogress .spinner-icon {
  width: var(--bprogress-spinner-size);
  height: var(--bprogress-spinner-size);
  box-sizing: border-box;
  border: solid var(--bprogress-spinner-border-size) transparent;
  border-top-color: var(--bprogress-color);
  border-left-color: var(--bprogress-color);
  border-radius: 50%;
  -webkit-animation: bprogress-spinner var(--bprogress-spinner-animation-duration) linear infinite;
  animation: bprogress-spinner var(--bprogress-spinner-animation-duration) linear infinite;
}

.bprogress-custom-parent {
  overflow: hidden;
  position: relative;
}

.bprogress-custom-parent .bprogress .spinner,
.bprogress-custom-parent .bprogress .bar {
  position: absolute;
}

.bprogress .indeterminate {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: var(--bprogress-height);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.bprogress .indeterminate .inc,
.bprogress .indeterminate .dec {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  height: 100%;
  background-color: var(--bprogress-color);
}

.bprogress .indeterminate .inc {
  animation: bprogress-indeterminate-increase 2s infinite;
}

.bprogress .indeterminate .dec {
  animation: bprogress-indeterminate-decrease 2s 0.5s infinite;
}

@-webkit-keyframes bprogress-spinner {
  0%   { -webkit-transform: rotate(0deg); transform: rotate(0deg); }
  100% { -webkit-transform: rotate(360deg); transform: rotate(360deg); }
}

@keyframes bprogress-spinner {
  0%   { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  100% { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}

@keyframes bprogress-indeterminate-increase {
  from { left: -5%; width: 5%; }
  to { left: 130%; width: 100%; }
}

@keyframes bprogress-indeterminate-decrease {
  from { left: -80%; width: 80%; }

d="m19.07 4.93-1.41 1.41"></path></svg>Light</button></div></div></div></aside><style>/* FORCE HIDE DEFAULT FERN HEADERS */
.fern-page-heading,
#fern-docs > div.transition-all.duration-500.ease-out > main > article > header, .fern-page-subtitle {
    display: none !important;
}

/* CUSTOM GLOWS - Theme aware */
html.dark .glow-box-green {
    box-shadow: 0 0 80px -20px rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.25);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.4);
    border: 1px solid rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.2);
}


html.dark .glow-box-purple {
    box-shadow: 0 0 80px -20px rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.25);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.4);
    border: 1px solid rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.2);
}

html.light .glow-box-purple {
    background: rgba(250, 245, 255, 0.6);
    border: 1px solid rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.3);
}

html.dark .glow-box-blue {
    box-shadow: 0 0 80px -20px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.25);
    background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.4);
    border: 1px solid rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2);
}

html.light .glow-box-blue {
    background: rgba(239, 246, 255, 0.6);
    border: 1px solid rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.3);
}

/* TEXT GRADIENT - Theme aware */
html.dark .hero-text-gradient {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff 30%, #4ade80 100%);
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    text-shadow: 0 0 50px rgba(74, 222, 128, 0.2);
}

html.light .hero-text-gradient {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a1a 30%, #16a34a 100%);
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    text-shadow: none;
}

/* CUSTOM LAYOUT GRID */
.custom-grid-2 {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    gap: 3rem;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 8rem;
}

@media (min-width: 1024px) {
    .custom-grid-2 {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    }
}

html.dark .fern-card {
    border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03) !important;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02) !important;
}

html.light .fern-card {
    border-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08) !important;
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.01) !important;
}

/* Remove jarring borders from card groups */
html.dark [class*="CardGroup"] > div,
html.dark .fern-card-group > div {
    border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) !important;
}

html.light [class*="CardGroup"] > div,
html.light .fern-card-group > div {
    border-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) !important;
}

/* Fix code block borders */
html.dark pre,
html.dark code,
html.dark .code-block,
html.dark [class*="code"],
html.dark .fern-code-block,
html.dark [class*="CodeBlock"],
html.dark [class*="shiki"],
html.dark [class*="syntax"],
html.dark .not-prose pre,
html.dark .not-prose code,
html.dark [data-rehype-pretty-code-fragment],
html.dark [data-rehype-pretty-code-fragment] pre,
html.dark figure[data-rehype-pretty-code-figure],
html.dark figure[data-rehype-pretty-code-figure] pre {
    border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) !important;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) !important;
}

html.light pre,
html.light code,
html.light .code-block,
html.light [class*="code"],
html.light .fern-code-block,
html.light [class*="CodeBlock"],
html.light [class*="shiki"],
html.light [class*="syntax"],
html.light .not-prose pre,
html.light .not-prose code,
html.light [data-rehype-pretty-code-fragment],
html.light [data-rehype-pretty-code-fragment] pre,
html.light figure[data-rehype-pretty-code-figure],
html.light figure[data-rehype-pretty-code-figure] pre {
    border-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) !important;
    border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) !important;
}

/* Target Fern's specific code styling */
html.dark .prose pre,
html.dark article pre,
html.dark [class*="prose"] pre,
html.dark div[class*="rounded"] > pre,
html.dark .not-prose.rounded-lg {
    border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) !important;
}

html.light .prose pre,
html.light article pre,
html.light [class*="prose"] pre,
html.light div[class*="rounded"] > pre,
html.light .not-prose.rounded-lg {
    border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) !important;
}

/* Hide anchor links on hover */
.anchor-link,
[class*="anchor"],
a[aria-hidden="true"],
.heading-anchor,
h1 a[href^="#"],
h2 a[href^="#"],
h3 a[href^="#"],
h4 a[href^="#"],
.fern-anchor,
[class*="headerLink"],
[class*="hash-link"] {
    display: none !important;
}

/* VISUAL HIERARCHY - Custom Typography with theme support */
.section-heading {
    font-size: 3rem !important;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
    letter-spacing: -0.02em !important;
    line-height: 1.1 !important;
    margin-bottom: 1rem !important;
}

.section-subheading {
    font-size: 1.25rem !important;
    margin-bottom: 4rem !important;
}

html.dark .section-subheading {
    color: #9ca3af !important;
}

html.light .section-subheading {
    color: #6b7280 !important;
}

.use-case-heading {
    font-size: 2rem !important;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
    letter-spacing: -0.01em !important;
    margin-bottom: 1rem !important;
}

/* SPACING - Let the page breathe */
.section-spacing {
    padding-top: 5rem !important;
    padding-bottom: 5rem !important;
}

.section-spacing-lg {
    padding-top: 6rem !important;
    padding-bottom: 6rem !important;
}

.content-gap {
    margin-bottom: 3rem !important;
}

.content-gap-lg {
    margin-bottom: 5rem !important;
}

/* CTA Buttons - Green Pill Style */
.cta-primary {
    background: #22c55e !important;
    color: #000 !important;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
    padding: 0.875rem 2rem !important;
    border-radius: 9999px !important;
    transition: all 0.2s ease !important;
    box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.3) !important;
}

.cta-primary:hover {
    background: #4ade80 !important;
    transform: scale(1.05) !important;
}

.cta-secondary {
    background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.1) !important;
    color: #4ade80 !important;
    font-weight: 600 !important;
    padding: 0.875rem 2rem !important;
    border-radius: 9999px !important;
    transition: all 0.2s ease !important;
}

.cta-secondary:hover {
    background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.2) !important;
    transform: scale(1.05) !important;
}

.cta-primary > p, .cta-secondary > p {
    margin-top: 0.25rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
}

/* Subtle secondary buttons - hide border */
.secondary-btn,
a.secondary-btn {
    border: none !important;
}

/* Theme-aware text colors */
html.dark .text-white,
html.dark h1.text-white,
html.dark h2.text-white,
html.dark h3.text-white,
html.dark p.text-white,
html.dark span.text-white,
html.dark a.text-white {
    color: #ffffff !important;
}

html.light .text-white,
html.light h1.text-white,
html.light h2.text-white,
html.light h3.text-white,
html.light p.text-white,
html.light span.text-white,
html.light a.text-white {
    color: #1a1a1a !important;
}

html.dark .text-gray-400,
html.dark p.text-gray-400 {
    color: #9ca3af !important;
}

html.light .text-gray-400,
html.light p.text-gray-400 {
    color: #6b7280 !important;
}

html.dark .text-green-400,
html.dark span.text-green-400 {
    color: #4ade80 !important;
}

html.light .text-green-400,
html.light span.text-green-400 {
    color: #16a34a !important;
}

html.dark .text-blue-300,
html.dark div.text-blue-300 {
    color: #93c5fd !important;
}

html.light .text-blue-300,
html.light div.text-blue-300 {
    color: #1d4ed8 !important;
}

/* Gradient text colors */
html.dark .bg-gradient-to-r {
    background: linear-gradient(to right, #86efac, #4ade80, #22c55e) !important;
}

html.light .bg-gradient-to-r {
    background: linear-gradient(to right, #15803d, #16a34a, #22c55e) !important;
}

/* Specific fix for hero gradient span */
html.dark .hero-gradient-span {
    background: linear-gradient(to right, #86efac, #4ade80, #22c55e) !important;
    -webkit-background-clip: text !important;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent !important;
}

html.light .hero-gradient-span {
    background: linear-gradient(to right, #15803d, #16a34a, #22c55e) !important;
    -webkit-background-clip: text !important;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent !important;
}

/* Secondary button theme colors */
html.dark .secondary-btn {
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) !important;
    color: #ffffff !important;
}

html.dark .secondary-btn:hover {
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1) !important;
}

html.light .secondary-btn {
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05) !important;
    color: #1a1a1a !important;
}

html.light .secondary-btn:hover {
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) !important;
}

img.rounded-xl {
  border-radius: 0.75rem !important;
